THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, ETHELL $4,155.69 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $200.64 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,221.33, DEFT TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SEE JDMT FOR DETAILS). PLTF MAY RECORD ABSTRACT OF JDMT. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY, ATTY FEES WILL INCREASE TO $750 & WRIT MAY ISSUE. BUT WRIT CANNOT BE LEVIED AGAINST DEFT'S HOME UNTIL AFTER IT IS SOLD.
